args: mkdir build 2>nul & nasm -f bin "${workspaceFolder}\src\boot\boot.asm" -o "${workspaceFolder}\build\boot.bin" && nasm -f bin "${workspaceFolder}\src\kernel\kernel.asm" -o "${workspaceFolder}\build\kernel.bin" && copy /b "${workspaceFolder}\build\boot.bin"+"${workspaceFolder}\build\kernel.bin" "${workspaceFolder}\build\laos.img" && qemu-system-i386 -drive format=raw,file="${workspaceFolder}\build\laos.img"

mkdir -p "${workspaceFolder}/build" && nasm -f bin "${workspaceFolder}/src/boot/boot.asm" -o "${workspaceFolder}/build/boot.bin" && nasm -f bin "${workspaceFolder}/src/kernel/kernel.asm" -o "${workspaceFolder}/build/kernel.bin" && cat "${workspaceFolder}/build/boot.bin" "${workspaceFolder}/build/kernel.bin" > "${workspaceFolder}/build/laos.img" && qemu-system-i386 -drive format=raw,file="${workspaceFolder}/build/laos.img"
